query: SELECT NOW() as db_now; SELECT id, status, startedAt, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, NOW()) as minutes_ago FROM agentActivityLogs WHERE status = 'started' ORDER BY startedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
